title: Test your endurance at Dust 4 Glory challenge
description: GARDEN ROUTE AND KLEIN KAROO NEWS - Mark...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE AND KLEIN KAROO NEWS - Mark your calendars for an unforgettable weekend of adventure at this year's Klein Karoo Dust 4 Glory Challenge (D4G) on Saturday 19 October, at the scenic Wilgewandel Holiday Farm.

The venue is just 2km from the renowned Cango Caves outside Oudtshoorn and the event promises to provide an exhilarating weekend of fun and adventure for everyone - families, friends, corporate teams and students alike.


> D4G is now also part of the Obstacle Sport Federation South Africa's (OSFSA) national series.


Event highlights

Wilgewandel is an ideal spot for spectators to cheer on participants taking part in one of the four categories.

The D4G Mini is a 1 to 2km colour run course with 10 fun obstacles for kids aged 3 to 11. It is a non-timed event and an adult must accompany each child.

The D4G Grade 6 and 7 is a 3 to 4km course featuring 10 exciting obstacles. This event is perfect for school teams. D4G Medium offers a 5km route with 10 obstacles and one water point and is open to participants aged 15 and older. Expect climbing, crawling, and navigating through mud and water.

The D4G Pro is a challenging 11 to 12km course with 22 obstacles and two water points for ages 19 and older. This event tests your strength and endurance with heavy objects to carry and drag through the course.


> Enjoy the beautiful surroundings and explore attractions near the venue, along with various accommodation options.


Bring your running shoes and adventurous spirit for a fantastic day. For more information or to enter, visit www.dust4glory.co.za or go to their Facebook page: Klein Karoo Dust 4 Glory Challenge.Online entries close at the end of today, Friday 18 October. Late entry fees will apply on Saturday.

As in previous years, participants in the D4G Pro can look forward to an event that tests their strength and endurance.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
